extension.summary: Rivulet: watch Stremio-protocol catalogs, addons and streams in Kodi
extension.description: Rivulet is a Kodi client for the Stremio addon protocol: browse Discover and Search catalogs, install community Stremio addons from a manifest URL, resolve streams and play them back through an embedded or remote stremio-server-go streaming server, and optionally sync your addon collection with your Stremio account.
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host, index or provide any media content. It is a client for third-party Stremio addons that you install yourself.
